expertAssessments.rationale: The prompt content contract tests were added and the production inverse healthy-status smoke still forces Metrics Query Agent.

Authenticated monitoring endpoint returned HTTP 200 after deploy and no resource-limit drift was observed.

completedImprovements.title: LLM intent classifier prompt includes explicit edge-case examples for metrics vs analyst routing
completedImprovements.evidence: Prompt content contract tests were added and production Cloud Run deploy smoke passed after manual fallback deploy.
completedImprovements.note: Examples cover inverse healthy-status filters, group warning comparison, multi-metric AND filters, short monitoring query, and saturation forecasting.
